title: Integration Email - Date Display Limitation

posts.author: alejencia (Alex Becerra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday team !

I have a date column that is currently reading in the following format inside the Board: Thu, Mar 19, 2020
but when the integration sends the email picking up that column it reads like this: SEE DATE section inside green box in the screenshot below. I was hoping for the format in the email to read just like in the column. Help?!

image669×681 141 KB

posts.author: ryanfacer (Ryan Facer)
posts.cookedHtml: Did you ever manage to find a solution to this? I have the same problem.

posts.author: ErickE-monday.com (Erick E.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ryanfacer!

I am afraid this may be a limitation with the coding algorithm used in the integration and there may be no workaround. I’d love to hear from @alejencia to see if a solution was found.

Feel free to email us to support@monday.com to take a closer look.

posts.author: DavidCramp (David Cramp)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I too would be very interested to know if a work around had been found. We are looking at sending automated emails to clients with the outlook email integration but we can’t if we can’t have dates properly formatted.

posts.author: samtoms (Sam Toms)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m having the same issue, 2020-10-12 isn’t clear whether it’s the 10th of December of the 12th of October. It’s making our automated emails very confusing!

posts.author: OfficeHounds (Maggie Langley)
posts.cookedHtml: Agree! I’m considering having a text field where I can type the date out in the format I want and use that in my automated emails.

posts.author: alejencia (Alex Becerra)
posts.cookedHtml: No updates on this as far as I’m concerned.

posts.author: OfficeHounds (Maggie Langley)
posts.cookedHtml: I decided to replace the date field with a text field, so I could choose how to format the date in automated emails.

posts.author: alejencia (Alex Becerra)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
